name: Insert Outlier Rejection Before Smoothed Rate
intent: Apply the same event-cleaning refinement when the downstream rate primitive is the smoothed estimator.
expected_information_flow_effect: Adds event cleanup between detection and the smoothed rate estimator without changing the family boundary.

audit.rationale: The smoothed rate path needs the same interval-cleanup semantics as the raw rate path.
audit.dejargonized_summary: Clean obviously bad beat intervals before the smoothed rate stage uses them.
uncertainty_notes: This asset reuses the same trigger semantics as the non-smoothed rate path.

references.title: Signal event rate refinement inventory
references.citation: Local transitional family refinement asset for smoothed event interval cleanup.
